metadata.description: Kubernetes: Kubernetes container orchestration platform. Manage the deployment, scaling, and operations of containerized applications. Here is a brief Python code example to demonstrate how you might interact with Kubernetes using the `kubernetes` Python client library: ```python from kubernetes import client, config # Load kubeconfig file (usually located at ~/.kube/config) config.load_kube_config() # Create an instance of the API class v1 = client.AppsV1Api() # List all deployments in the default namespace deployments = v1.list_namespaced_deployment(namespace="default") for deployment in deployments.items: print(f"Deployment: {deployment.metadata.name}") ``` This code snippet loads the Kubernetes configuration, creates an API instance for managing applications (deployments), and lists all deployments in the default namespace.
